creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
> - Create an issue upstream [1], adding upstream issue to See Also when created.
> [1] https://github.com/python/cpython/issues

Creating an issue upstream requires consenting to
a) https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/github-terms/github-terms-of-service
b) https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-privacy-statement

Having read a) and b) I'm not willing to accept Github's terms of service and privacy statement.
